steps.title: Identify the contrast between the flags
steps.content: Eritrea's flag includes an olive branch; Croatia's flag includes leopards. The task asks to emphasize a difference, so we need language that highlights how these flags differ.

steps.title: Choose the option that emphasizes the difference
steps.content: Choice D uses whereas to set the flags in direct opposition, highlighting what distinguishes them—one features a plant, the other an animal. The other choices either frame symbols as something both countries share (A, B) or shift focus away from the specific symbols (C). That matches choice D — D is correct.
